semantic synthesis when limited views are available. In this paper, we
introduce a novel generative framework, coined LangSc

articles.author: Nafisa Mehtaj
articles.description:
I am working on a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) for learning wave dynamics on a metal plate. The input consists of spatial and temporal coordinates:
Input:  x, y, t    
Output: u, v

The outputs u and v are displacement fields with values ranging from 100 to 10-15 (after normalization), spanning many orders of magnitude. This vast dynamic range creates optimization instability in a single-head network. To handle this, I decomposed each output as:

u = sign(u)⋅10mag(u)  v = sign(v)⋅10mag
